calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Rebecca Wagner In Support Thereof [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM OF RITA ZAMORA

Appearances: Rebecca D. Wagner of the Office of the District Attorney (415.553.4997) for petitioner and moving party; No other appearances.

Petitioner stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, no opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Rebecca Wagner In Support Thereof [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Jun-09-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca D. Wagner, of Office of the District Attorney, Tel. 415.553.4997, for petitioners;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is taken off calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Paoli; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY REBECCA D WAGNER OF THE OFFICE OF THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY TEL NO. 415-553-4997 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING- PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported. =302/JPT.
